hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.env|*.env.*|*/.env|*/.env.*) echo "Blocked: refuse to edit secrets file $f. Use .env.example or environment variables instead." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) ruff check --fix --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null; black --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null; echo "Formatted: $f" ;; esac
